_info: PharSayo Philippines GTIN list (curated). Add keys as digits-only barcodes. Not an official FDA register—expand for your deployment.

4807788561688.purpose_en: Pain reliever and fever reducer (Analgesic/Antipyretic). Used for headache, fever, and minor body aches.
4807788561688.purpose_fil: Gamot para sa lagnat at sakit ng katawan (Analgesic/Antipyretic). Ginagamit para sa sakit ng ulo, lagnat, at kirot.
4807788561688.precautions_en: Do not take more than 4,000mg in 24 hours. Avoid alcohol. Consult a doctor if you have liver disease.
4807788561688.precautions_fil: Huwag uminom ng higit sa 4,000mg sa loob ng 24 oras. Iwasan ang alak. Kumonsulta sa doktor kung may sakit sa atay.
4807788561688.frequency_hint: Every 4 to 6 hours as needed, or as directed by your doctor.

4807788560650.purpose_en: Relieves clogged nose, headache, and fever without causing drowsiness.
4807788560650.purpose_fil: Pampawala ng baradong ilong at lagnat nang hindi nakakaantok.
4807788560650.precautions_en: Do not exceed recommended dose. Ask a doctor if you have heart problems.
4807788560650.precautions_fil: Huwag lumampas sa tamang dosis. Magtanong sa doktor kung may sakit sa puso.
4807788560650.frequency_hint: 1 tablet every 6 hours, or as directed by your doctor.

4807788561145.purpose_en: Mucolytic. Thins and loosens phlegm to make it easier to cough out.
4807788561145.purpose_fil: Mucolytic. Nagpapalabnaw at nagpapaluwag ng plema para mas madaling mailabas sa pag-ubo.
4807788561145.precautions_en: Do not use if you have an active stomach ulcer. Consult a doctor if pregnant or breastfeeding.
4807788561145.precautions_fil: Huwag gamitin kung may aktibong ulcer sa sikmura. Kumonsulta sa doktor kung buntis o nagpapasuso.
4807788561145.frequency_hint: 1 capsule every 8 hours, or as directed by your doctor.

4807788561619.purpose_en: Relieves flu-like symptoms including fever, body aches, headache, and clogged nose.
4807788561619.purpose_fil: Pampawala ng sintomas ng trangkaso gaya ng lagnat, sakit ng katawan, sakit ng ulo, at baradong ilong.
4807788561619.precautions_en: May cause drowsiness. Avoid alcohol. Consult a doctor if you have heart or liver problems.
4807788561619.precautions_fil: Maaaring magdulot ng pagkaantok. Iwasan ang alak. Kumonsulta sa doktor kung may problema sa puso o atay.
4807788561619.frequency_hint: 1 tablet every 6 hours, or as directed by your doctor.

5290665007802.purpose_en: Pain reliever and fever reducer (NSAID). Used for headache, muscle pain, and minor aches.
5290665007802.purpose_fil: Gamot sa kirot at lagnat (NSAID). Ginagamit sa sakit ng ulo, kalamnan, at pananakit ng katawan.
5290665007802.precautions_en: Take after meals. Avoid if you have stomach ulcers. Consult a doctor if you have heart or kidney issues.
5290665007802.precautions_fil: Inumin pagkatapos kumain. Huwag gamitin kung may ulcer. Magtanong sa doktor kung may sakit sa puso o bato.
5290665007802.frequency_hint: 1 to 2 tablets every 4 to 6 hours as needed. Do not exceed 6 tablets in 24 hours.

4800016052061.purpose_en: NSAID. Relief of mild to moderate pain, including dental pain, post-operative pain, and menstrual pain.
4800016052061.purpose_fil: NSAID. Pampawala ng katamtamang sakit, gaya ng sakit sa ngipin, sakit pagkatapos ng operasyon, at dysmenorrhea.
4800016052061.precautions_en: Take with food. Do not use for more than 7 days. Avoid if you have asthma or stomach ulcers.
4800016052061.precautions_fil: Inumin kasabay ng pagkain. Huwag gamitin ng mahigit sa 7 araw. Iwasan kung may hika o ulcer sa sikmura.
4800016052061.frequency_hint: 1 tablet every 8 hours, or as directed by your doctor.

4800016651172.purpose_en: Vitamin E supplement for healthy skin and antioxidant protection.
4800016651172.purpose_fil: Supplement na Vitamin E para sa malusog na balat at proteksyon laban sa free radicals.
4800016651172.precautions_en: Consult a doctor if you have blood clotting issues or are taking blood thinners.
4800016651172.precautions_fil: Kumonsulta sa doktor kung may problema sa pamumuo ng dugo o umiinom ng pampalabnaw ng dugo.
4800016651172.frequency_hint: 1 capsule daily, or as directed by your doctor.

4800016604819.purpose_en: Vitamin and mineral supplement for children to boost immunity and prevent deficiencies.
4800016604819.purpose_fil: Supplement na bitamina at mineral para sa bata pampalakas ng resistensya.
4800016604819.precautions_en: Follow age-appropriate dosage on label. Consult a pediatrician.
4800016604819.precautions_fil: Sundin ang tamang dosis para sa edad na nasa label. Kumonsulta sa pediatrician.
4800016604819.frequency_hint: Once daily, or as directed by your doctor.

4806016351820.purpose_en: Vitamin C supplement to boost immunity and skin health.
4806016351820.purpose_fil: Supplement na Vitamin C para sa resistensya at kalusugan ng balat.
4806016351820.precautions_en: Consult a doctor if you have kidney problems.
4806016351820.precautions_fil: Kumonsulta sa doktor kung may problema sa bato.
4806016351820.frequency_hint: 1 to 2 tablets daily, or as directed by your doctor.

4800016104210.precautions_en: Do not use if you have bloody stool or high fever. Avoid overdose.
4800016104210.precautions_fil: Huwag gamitin kung may dugo sa dumi o lagnat. Iwasan ang sobrang dosis.
4800016104210.frequency_hint: 2 capsules initially, then 1 capsule after each loose stool. Max 8 caps per day.
